metadata.title: Rollover Daily Todos with Context
metadata.description: Rollover Daily Todos with Context Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Confirm Undo
ast.target: 确认撤销

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, unfinished todos from the previous daily note are rolled into today's note as soon as today's daily note file is created. This does not run when you merely open an existing note.
ast.target: 启用后，当今日的每日笔记文件被创建时，前一日笔记中未完成的待办事项会立即滚动到今日笔记中。仅打开现有笔记时不会触发此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters inside `[...]` that mark a checkbox as done. Default is "xX-". Tasks already marked `[>]` are never rolled again.
ast.target: `[...]` 内标记复选框为已完成的字符。默认为 \"xX-\"。已标记为 `[>]` 的任务不会再次滚动。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Previous day todo behavior
ast.target: 前一日待办事项行为

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Roll over children of todos
ast.target: 滚动待办事项的子项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic rollover on daily note creation
ast.target: 每日笔记创建时自动滚动

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Done status markers
ast.target: 完成状态标记符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add extra blank line between Heading and Todos
ast.target: 在标题和待办事项之间添加额外空行

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a note in the editor first.
ast.target: 请先在编辑器中打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Active file is not in your daily notes folder/format.
ast.target: 当前活动文件不在您的每日笔记文件夹/格式中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No completed todos to move.
ast.target: 没有已完成的待办事项可移动。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Moved completed todos to the bottom of each section in this note.
ast.target: 已将已完成的待办事项移动到此笔记中每个部分的底部。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: RolloverTodosPlugin unable to rollover unfinished todos: Please enable Daily Notes, or Periodic Notes (with daily notes enabled).
ast.target: RolloverTodosPlugin 无法滚动未完成的待办事项：请启用 Daily Notes，或启用 Periodic Notes（并开启每日笔记功能）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rollover: no daily notes found before today.
ast.target: 滚动：在今日之前未找到每日笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rollover: nothing to forward—only open `- [ ]` tasks are forwarded.
ast.target: 滚动：没有内容可转发——仅转发打开的 `- [ ]` 任务。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rollover Todos Now
ast.target: 立即滚动待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rollover todos from all previous daily notes
ast.target: 从所有之前的每日笔记中滚动待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move completed todos to bottom of each section
ast.target: 将已完成的待办事项移动到每个部分的底部

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上次滚动

ast.name: text
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上次滚动

ast.name: text
ast.source: A single rollover command can be undone, which reloads the note files from before the rollover (today plus any changed earlier daily notes). Any text you may have added in those files since then may be deleted.
ast.target: 可以撤销单次滚动操作，这将重新加载滚动前的笔记文件（今日及任何已更改的早期每日笔记）。您在此期间可能添加到这些文件中的任何文本可能会被删除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changes made with undo:
ast.target: 撤销所做的更改：
